zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerald Lord Of Drumrany Dillon於1312年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 維斯特亞斯德盧姆藍尼時，他的父親Robert Dillon28歲，母親Anne le Poer21歲。他和Lady Emily Fitzgerald至少有6個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1372年在他的家鄉享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gerald Lord Of Drumrany Dillon于1312年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 維斯特亞斯德盧姆藍尼时，他的父亲Robert Dillon28岁，母亲Anne le Poer21岁。他和Lady Emily Fitzgerald至少有6个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1372年在他的家乡享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dillon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Irish, and French: from the Norman French personal name Dillon, arising from the ancient Germanic Dillo (of uncertain origin, perhaps a byname from the root dil- ‘destroy’).
English: habitational name from Dilwyn in Herefordshire, recorded in 1138 as Dilun, probably from Old English dīglum, dative plural of dīgle ‘settlement at the shady or secret places’.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duilleáin ‘descendant of Duilleán’, a personal name, a variant of Dallán meaning ‘little blind one’.

variants.name: Delon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Michel.
French: from a short form of the personal name Adelon, from ancient Germanic Adelo, a pet form of compound names formed with the element adel ‘noble’.

variants.name: Dillion
meanings: Irish and English: possibly a variant of   Dillon  .

variants.name: Dillow
meanings: English: habitational name from Dilwyn in Herefordshire, recorded as Delewe in 1295 and Dylewe in 1334. Compare Dillon 2.

nameMeanings.name: Gerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + wald ‘rule’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. There has been some confusion with Gerard . It died out in England at the end of the 13th century. However, it continued to be popular in Ireland, where it had been brought in the 12th century at the time of Strongbow's invasion. It was used in England in the 17th century and revived in the 19th century, along with several other long-extinct names of Norman, Old English, and Celtic origin, and is now more common than Gerard, which survived all along as an English ‘gentry’ name.

variants.name: Jerrold
meanings: Rare variant of   Gerald  , probably a transferred use of the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Reduced form of Old Norse Þorfriðr, from Þórr ( see Tor ) + friðr ‘peace’.

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Gerald Lord Of Drumrany Dillon was born in 1312, in Drumraney, County Westmeath, Ireland, his father, Robert Dillon, was 28 and his mother, Anne le Poer, was 21. He had at least 6 sons and 2 daughters with Lady Emily Fitzgerald. He died in 1372, in his hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerald Lord Of Drumrany Dillon est né en 1312, à Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irlande, son père, Robert Dillon, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Anne le Poer, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles avec Lady Emily Fitzgerald. Il est décédé en 1372, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gerald Lord Of Drumrany Dillon 1312 in Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Dillon 28 und seine Mutter Anne le Poer 21. Er hatte mit Lady Emily Fitzgerald mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1372 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gerald Lord Of Drumrany Dillon è nato il nel 1312 nel Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irlanda, il suo padre, Robert Dillon, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Anne le Poer, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie con Lady Emily Fitzgerald. Morì nel 1372, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerald Lord Of Drumrany Dillonが1312年にアイルランドコウントイ ウエストメアスドルムランエイで生まれた時，父Robert Dillonは28歳，母Anne le Poerは21歳であった。彼はLady Emily Fitzgeraldとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1372年に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gerald Lord Of Drumrany Dillon(이)가 1312년 아일랜드 카운티 웨스트미스 드럼랜이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Dillon(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne le Poer(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Lady Emily Fitzgerald(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1372년 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gerald Lord Of Drumrany Dillon nasceu em 1312, em Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irlanda, seu pai, Robert Dillon, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Anne le Poer, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas com Lady Emily Fitzgerald. Ele faleceu em 1372, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gerald Lord Of Drumrany Dillon родился в 1312 г. в местности друмрани, коунти вестмит, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Robert Dillon было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne le Poer, 21. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери от Lady Emily Fitzgerald. Он умер в 1372 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gerald Lord Of Drumrany Dillon nació en 1312, en Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irlanda, su papá, Robert Dillon, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Anne le Poer, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas con Lady Emily Fitzgerald. Murió en 1372, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años.
